name: Mexican-Meatball Tidbits
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cornmeal (or fine dry bread crumbs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the egg, water, salt, and 2 tablespoons of chili seasoning from the package; mix lightly.
2. Add the cornmeal and ground beef to the mixture. Shape into small meatballs.
3. Arrange the meatballs on an ungreased shallow baking sheet.
4. Bake in a 450-degree oven for 10 to 15 minutes, until done.
5. In a large skillet or chafing dish, combine the remaining chili mix, tomato juice, and lemon juice.
6. Add the meatballs; heat to simmering.
7. Keep warm. Serve with wooden picks.
